lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨੁ ਸੁ ਮੁਨਿ ਜੋ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kavan su mun jo man maarai |
lines.english: Who is that silent sage, who has killed his mind?
Who has established himself as a Siddha, a being of miraculous spiritual powers, by killing his mind? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਉ ਮਾਰਿ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਤਾਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man kau maar kahahu kis taarai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By killing the mind, tell me, who is saved? ||1||Pause||
Everyone speaks through the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਾਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man maare bin bhagat na hoee |2|
lines.english: Without killing the mind, devotional worship is not performed. ||2||
Says Kabeer, one who knows the secret of this mystery,
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
The stars which are seen in the sky
beholds within his own mind the Lord of the three worlds. ||3||28||
- who is the painter who painted them? ||1||
Very fortunate is the knower who knows this. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਰੇ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਅੰਬਰੁ ਕਾ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: kahu re panddit anbar kaa siau laagaa |
lines.english: Tell me, O Pandit, what is the sky attached to?
God's creative extension extends everywhere. ||2||
The sun and the moon give their light;
Says Kabeer, he alone knows this,
She has brought a chain and a rope. ||1||
whose heart is filled with the Lord, and whose mouth is also filled with the Lord. ||3||29||
The Simritee is the daughter of the Vedas, O Siblings of Destiny.
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
She has imprisoned the people in her own city.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਕੈ ਫਾਧਿ ਕਾਲ ਸਰੁ ਸਾਂਧਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: moh kai faadh kaal sar saandhiaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: She has tightened the noose of emotional attachment and shot the arrow of death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਦੇਖਤ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਲੂਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ham dekhat jin sabh jag loottiaa |
lines.english: Before my very eyes, she has plundered the entire world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਸਾਪਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਜਗ ਕਉ ਖਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saa saapan hoe jag kau khaaee |2|
lines.english: She has become a serpent, and she is eating the world. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਟੀ ਨ ਕਟੈ ਤੂਟਿ ਨਹ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kattee na kattai toott neh jaaee |
lines.english: By cutting, she cannot be cut, and she cannot be broken.
I have grasped the reins and attached the bridle;
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਮੈ ਰਾਮ ਕਹਿ ਛੂਟਿਆ ॥੩॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer mai raam keh chhoottiaa |3|30|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, chanting the Lord's Name, I have escaped her. ||3||30||
I made self-reflection my mount,
abandoning everything, I now ride through the skies. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਕੈ ਪਾਵੜੈ ਪਗੁ ਧਰਿ ਲੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj kai paavarrai pag dhar leejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and in the stirrups of intuitive poise, I placed my feet. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲੁ ਰੇ ਬੈਕੁੰਠ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਲੇ ਤਾਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: chal re baikuntth tujheh le taarau |
lines.english: Come, and let me ride you to heaven.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਚਹਿ ਤ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਕੈ ਚਾਬੁਕ ਮਾਰਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hicheh ta prem kai chaabuk maarau |2|
lines.english: If you hold back, then I shall strike you with the whip of spiritual love. ||2||
Vedas, the Koran and the Bible are the best riders. ||3||31||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
That mouth, which used to eat the five delicacies
Says Kabeer, those who remain detached from the

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਇ ਕਾਟਹੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik dukh raam raae kaattahu meraa |
lines.english: O Lord, my King, please rid me of this one affliction:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਨਿ ਦਹੈ ਅਰੁ ਗਰਭ ਬਸੇਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: agan dahai ar garabh baseraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: may I not be burned in fire, or cast into the womb again. ||1||Pause||
- I have seen the flames being applied to that mouth. ||1||
The body is destroyed by so many ways and means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋ ਜਾਰੇ ਕੋ ਗਡਿ ਲੇ ਮਾਟੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ko jaare ko gadd le maattee |2|
lines.english: Some burn it, and some bury it in the earth. ||2||
Says Kabeer, O Lord, please reveal to me Your Lotus Feet;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਛੈ ਤੇ ਜਮੁ ਕਿਉ ਨ ਪਠਾਵਹੁ ॥੩॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: paachhai te jam kiau na patthaavahu |3|32|
lines.english: after that, go ahead and send me to my death. ||3||32||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਜਪਤ ਤਨੁ ਜਰਿ ਕੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: raam japat tan jar kee na jaae |
lines.english: When I chant the Lord's Name, what does it matter if my body burns?
When our Lord and Master wishes to burn someone, then who can save him? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਚਿਤੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam chit rahiaa samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My consciousness remains absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||
He Himself is the fire, and He Himself is the wind.
The Lord plays, like the juggler with his ball. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾ ਕੋ ਜਰੈ ਕਾਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਹਾਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaa ko jarai kaeh hoe haan |
lines.english: Who is burned, and who suffers loss?
If He is your Lord and Master, He will protect you. ||3||33||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee, Dho-Padhay:
Says Kabeer, chant the two letters of the Lord's Name - Raa Maa.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮੈ ਜੋਗ ਧਿਆਨ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa mai jog dhiaan chit laaeaa |
lines.english: I have not practiced Yoga, or focused my consciousness on meditation.
Without renunciation, I cannot escape Maya. ||1||
How have I passed my life?
